description: Caller demands 3 PM tomorrow (no OPD ever runs at 3 PM); agent must offer real alternatives.
judge_questions: Did the agent avoid inventing a 3 PM slot and clearly offer real alternatives from tool results?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, yes, I need to book an appointment for my son with a paediatrician. It has to be tomorrow at exactly 3 PM, please.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I have a few paediatricians available. We have Dr. Krishan Chugh, Dr. Vikas Dua, Dr. Anand Sinha, Dr. Manvinder Singh Sachdev, and Dr. Neetu Talwar.

Which doctor would you like to see? Also, please note that I can check for availability around three o'clock tomorrow, Friday the seventeenth.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: I'll go with Dr. Neetu Talwar, but like I said, it really needs to be at 3 PM sharp. I have a very tight schedule tomorrow, so please make sure it's exactly that time.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I apologize, but Dr. Neetu Talwar does not have any openings at three o'clock tomorrow. 

The closest available times for her are tomorrow, Friday the seventeenth, at nine thirty in the morning, or later today at five o'clock or six thirty in the evening. Would any of those work for you?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, come on, 9:30 AM is impossible for me with school drop-offs. Are you sure there’s absolutely nothing at 3 PM? I really can't shift my work schedule around. If she’s truly booked, I suppose I have to take the 9:30 AM, but this is very inconvenient. Fine, book it for 9:30 AM then. My name is Kavita Rao, phone number 9811111005.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I've successfully booked your appointment with Dr. Neetu Talwar for Friday, the seventeenth of July, at nine thirty in the morning. The consultation fee is 1800 rupees. 

Just to confirm, your name is Kavita Rao and your phone number is 9 8 1 1 1 1 1 0 0 5. Is that correct?

doctors.name: Dr. Vikas Dua
doctors.designation: Principal Director & Head - Pediatric Hematology, Hemato Oncology & Bone Marrow Transplant

result.note: multiple matches — ask the caller to choose

result.message: No open slots in that window.
